task_completion.description: Verify the rule name and trigger event are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Business Rule configuration form where the 'Rule Name' field is filled with 'Auto-Route Network Issues' and the execution trigger (e.g., 'Execute on') is set to 'Create' or 'Creation' of a request.

task_completion.description: Verify the rule criteria matches the required subject keywords with a 'Match Any' condition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the criteria/conditions section showing 'Subject' 'contains' 'network' and 'Subject' 'contains' 'connectivity'. Ensure the logical operator between them is 'OR' or the overall condition is set to 'Match Any'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Category and Subcategory actions are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Actions section of the form showing 'Category' being set to 'Network' and 'Subcategory' set to 'Connectivity'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Priority and Group actions are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Actions section of the form showing 'Priority' being set to 'High' and 'Group' set to 'Network Support'.

task_completion.description: Verify the rule has been saved and is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message confirming the rule was saved, or the Business Rules list view showing 'Auto-Route Network Issues' present in the list and marked as enabled (e.g., an active toggle switch or green checkmark).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show dropdowns being clicked, text being typed into fields, and buttons being pressed within the application UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (like INSERT INTO) or database management tools being used to create the rule.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Rule Name: 'Auto-Route Network Issues'. Trigger Event: Create/Creation of a new request. Criteria: Subject contains 'network' OR 'connectivity' (Match Any). Actions: Priority = 'High', Category = 'Network', Subcategory = 'Connectivity', Group = 'Network Support'. The rule must be saved and enabled.
